helpSection.title: How can we help you today?

heroSection.title: Pakistan's First AI Enabled App
heroSection.subtitle: Track your heart rate, blood pressure, and more with just your phone's front camera — anytime, anywhere.

expertSection.title: Care you can trust – Backed by leading experts
expertSection.description: Our team of 120+ technical and medical experts across Pakistan, as well as our health clinics, are committed to making Pakistan healthier and happier. With over 10,000+ patients, we blend compassionate healthcare with cutting-edge Artificial Intelligence technology.
